## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? Why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / maintenance
- [ ] CI / tooling
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes with no errors
- [ ] Tested manually by loading the extension in Chrome (`chrome://extensions` → Load unpacked)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] If user-facing: `extension/manifest.json` version bumped
- [ ] No secrets, PATs or sensitive data committed
- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `ci:`, etc.)
